matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Master of Education (Mathematics Education) PACES entry only is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The PACES-MEd Mathematics Education route is for anyone with a research or professional interest in mathematics education at any level of education (primary, secondary, or tertiary), wanting to undertake advanced study in a world-class setting. The Mathematics Education route is taught by a specialist team, and it is ideal for researchers, teachers, school leaders, and other professionals looking to take the next step in their career in Mathematics Education. Many of our students are working professionals who continue in full-time posts while studying.
